form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 17 at Hanshin December 6 over 1600m, 12 len behind Grand Opus with 55.0kg at $106.20. On debut fifth of 18 at Kyoto November 15 over 1600m, 4 len behind Grace Sienne with 55.0kg at $64.10. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 14th of 16 at Nakayama on December 14 over 1600m, 24 len behind G T Shindo carrying 55.0kg at $34.60. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign ran last of 17 at Chukyo on December 21 over 1400m, 17 len behind Terviseks carrying 54.0kg at $294.90. First up last campaign second last of 9 at Hanshin Dirt on September 6 over 1400m, 18 len behind Everyday carrying 54.0kg at $39.80. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 9 at Funabashi on April 3 over 1200m, 5 len behind Ficus Lyrata with 51kg at $5.60. The start before that 4th of 8 at Funabashi on March 13 over 1200m, 10 len behind Mari Face with 51kg at $14.80. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up second last of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1500m, 47 len behind One Momentum with 56kg at $205.60. Second-up ran last of 10 at Funabashi on March 11 over 1500m, 17 len behind Fours Men with 56kg at $244.40. Has failed to show enough.

form.formComment: Comes off a 37 day let-up. Last start 12th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on March 1 over 1200m, 16 len behind Mogensen carrying 55.0kg at $221. The race before that 4th of 11 at Nagoya on January 14 over 1500m, 7 len behind Ciel Rise carrying 55kg at $10.30. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 8 len win at this track March 5 over 1500m defeating Smart Laster carrying 56kg at $2.40. Before that 7th of 14 at this track on February 4 over 1500m, 4 len behind Awake Third with 56kg at $3. Hard to beat if he brings his A-game.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Comes here off a 33-day let-up. form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on March 1 over 1800m, 54 len behind Pure Emblem with 55.0kg at $203.80. The start before that 9th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 10 len behind Engel Lied carrying 54kg at $24.70. Not doing enough to threaten the top few today.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up raced on the pace when 2nd of 9 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Ryuno Essence with 56kg at $4.10. Last start won by 0.5 len at Urawa March 17 over 1400m defeating Aljanah carrying 56kg at $3.10. Promising galloper. Should go well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign eighth of 16 at Nakayama Dirt January 25 over 1200m, 12 len behind Satono Escape carrying 52.0kg at $35.40. When resuming last campaign sixth of 16 at Nakayama Dirt January 10 over 1200m, 7 len behind Live Red Eye with 55.0kg at $111.40. Not without claims.
